productDisplayName: Red Chief Men Brown Leather Shoes
description: Style NoteIf you thought feet healthy features come only in sports shoes - you're wrong! These anti-shock shoes from red chief come with an embedded air tube at the heel to absorb shock during activities and minimize its impact on the foot. What's more its crafted from plush leather in a beautiful caramel brown shade. The brand ups the ante for semi-formal dressing with this shoe. Style this with chinos or corduroy trousers and tonal jackets. Product DetailsBrown leather blunt toed shoe with tape detail at the midfoot sides and woven lacesCentral lace-ups and a padded tongueCushioned insole and padding at the mouthPU outsole with an air unit at the heelSquare lugs all over the outsole with an arched midfoot and an upraised heelMaterial and CareLeatherClean with a leather brushDo not store under sunlight or wash
